(DEVICE FILE: USB31_TYPE_C_0_USB_TYPEC_304_TY)

PACKAGE USB_TYPEC_304
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 16

PINORDER USB31_TYPE_C_0_USB_TYPEC_304_TY CC1 CC2 DM1 DM2 DP1 DP2 GND1 GND3 GND_E1 GND_E2 GND_E3,
      GND_E4 SBU1 SBU2 VBUS_1 VBUS_3
FUNCTION G1 USB31_TYPE_C_0_USB_TYPEC_304_TY A5 B5 A7 B7 A6 B6 A1B12 B1A12 E1 E2 E3 E4 A8 B8 A4A9,
      B4B9

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME USB31_TYPE_C_0
PACKAGEPROP VALUE 'TYPEC-304-ACP16'

END
